name: Twitch live alert with pinger role
description: Subscribes to one or more Twitch channels via EventSub. When a stream goes live, posts an embed in #stream-alerts and pings the StreamPings role. Auto-edits the message to past-tense once the stream ends, so the alert doesn't stay 'live' all night.
i18nNotes: All embed labels keyed; stream title/URL come from Twitch API. Ping spam suppressed via per-channel cooldown.
